personal.name: Alex Marine
personal.title: Full Stack Developer & Ocean Explorer
personal.bio: Passionate about building scalable web applications and exploring the depths of the digital and physical ocean. I specialize in React, Node.js, and creating immersive user experiences.

projects.title: Ocean Wave Simulator
projects.description: A high-performance wave physics simulation built with Three.js and WebGL shaders.

projects.title: Coral Reef Tracker
projects.description: IoT-based monitoring system for coral reef health using real-time sensor data.

experience.description: Leading the development of a real-time maritime monitoring dashboard used by port authorities worldwide.
Built and maintained multiple MVPs for early-stage startups in the green-tech space.

testimonials.name: Jane Doe
testimonials.text: Alex is an exceptional developer who brings a unique creative perspective to every project. Their work on our dashboard was transformative.
